mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.contact_id AS contactId, c.name AS contactName, i.interaction_type AS interactionType, i.summary, i.interaction_time AS interactionTime, i.next_follow_up_date AS nextFollowUpDate, i.is_follow_up_completed AS isFollowUpCompleted FROM interactions i JOIN contacts c ON i.contact_id = c.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND i.next_follow_up_date IS NOT NULL AND i.is_follow_up_completed = 0 ORDER BY i.next_follow_up_date ASC
